title: GLP-1 Medications and Skin Aging: What Women Over 40 Need to Know
author: Happy Aging Team
meta_description: GLP-1 medications like Ozempic can cause facial volume loss and collagen decline. Learn a 5-step skin preservation protocol for women over 40 on semaglutide.
